title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; chat, embed, pull and manage models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node & browsers; same surface as the Python SDK.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package exposing Ollama models as LLM, chat and embedding components.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Open-source ChatGPT-style web interface for Ollama; manage models & conversations in the browser.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama; fluent builder API, async calls, Android compatible.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Official Ruby gem for Ollama; idiomatic Ruby wrappers for chat, embed and model APIs.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Rust-powered interactive CLI for chatting with Ollama models; syntax highlighting, history.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns any Ollama model into inline code completions and chat copilot.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration to use Ollama models as generators or embedders in RAG pipelines.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: Official C# / .NET client for Ollama; supports .NET 6+, Unity, Blazor and MAUI.

title: ollama-kotlin-sdk
summary: Multiplatform Kotlin SDK (JVM/Android/Native) for Ollama; coroutines first.

title: ollama-n8n-node
summary: n8n community node that exposes Ollama chat and embedding actions in no-code workflows.

title: ollama-go
summary: Official Go client for Ollama; small surface, context-based cancellation, http.Client reuse.

title: ollama-docker-compose
summary: Official Docker image and compose stacks for CPU & GPU (CUDA/ROCm) deployments.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Community Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU autoscaling.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Official Rust crate for Ollama; async/await, serde, streams via tokio.

title: ollama-django
summary: Django app + REST API that wraps Ollama for chat, embeddings and model management.

title: ollama-rag-panel
summary: Gradio-based RAG playground that pairs Ollama with Chroma/Qdrant for document QA.

title: ollama-logseq
summary: Logseq plugin that brings local LLM assistance to your knowledge base via Ollama.
